'''B'olba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who served as an aide to [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
[[30 BBY/Legends|Two years]] after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], B'olba escorted Senator Tikkes to a [[Unidentified jungle world (Kamdon system)|remote planet]] that was for sale and had attracted the corrupt senator's attention. On their way, they discovered an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] in the planet's orbit and found that there were three [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] aboard: [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], and [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]]. The Jedi's cruiser had just been attacked by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], a former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] of [[The Dark Woman|An'ya Kuro]]. When the group reached the planet's surface, B'olba counted among those who left the ship to look at the new world. He was killed by Sing who also landed on the planet to assassinate Senator Tikkes and the Jedi.

{{Char-stub}}
